title: feat(work-on): add skip_if to entry for plan_outline source
body:
## Goal
Add skip_if to entry state so plan-backed children with ISSUE_SOURCE=plan_outline auto-advance to plan_context_injection.

## Acceptance Criteria
- entry state has a skip_if block firing when vars.ISSUE_SOURCE equals plan_outline
- Injects mode: plan_backed to route to plan_context_injection

## Dependencies
None
